summary.strategic_insight: High-risk periods: March 2026, May 2026, August 2026. Escalate monitoring and resource allocation.  Sustained delay rate of 25% requires structural process optimisation across the horizon.  Proactive interventions could prevent up to 877K TND in losses over 6 months - ROI positive.

alerts.message: High delay rate forecast: 26% in March 2026. Intensify SLA monitoring and assign senior handlers to flagged cases.

recommendations: Early intervention this month could prevent up to 151K TND in losses.
Pre-assign 248 high-risk claims to fast-track handlers.
Flag 35 suspected fraud dossiers for proactive investigation.
Agent workload at 93% capacity - consider temporary staffing.
Claims activity lower than average - opportunity to accelerate pending backlog.

monthly_details.seasonal_context: Spring traffic surge: Road accidents increase
recommendations: Early intervention this month could prevent up to 141K TND in losses.
Pre-assign 238 high-risk claims to fast-track handlers.
Flag 31 suspected fraud dossiers for proactive investigation.
Agent workload at 100% capacity - consider temporary staffing.
Claims activity lower than average - opportunity to accelerate pending backlog.

monthly_details.seasonal_context: May public holidays: Traffic spike risk

recommendations: Early intervention this month could prevent up to 139K TND in losses.
Pre-assign 232 high-risk claims to fast-track handlers.
Flag 33 suspected fraud dossiers for proactive investigation.
Agent workload at 97% capacity - consider temporary staffing.
Claims activity lower than average - opportunity to accelerate pending backlog.
